article:lKCkGkoaXDE.title: NASA Announces Spacewalkers for Robotic Arm Repair Work
article:lKCkGkoaXDE.description: Spacewalk preparations filled the schedule aboard the International Space Station on Tuesday as a pair of astronauts gear up for next week’s external robotics repair job. CubeSat maintenance and eye checks rounded out the day for the Expedition 74 crew.
